title: 🔁 Paradox Engines
name: Paradox Engines
what_it_is: Symbolic machines that loop through contradictory logic to produce output—similar to Escher’s stairs or logic circuits that never resolve.
how_to_use: her heart is a paradox engine—power sourced from impossible loops
this machine thinks through contradiction—its output a spiral of recursive truth-illusions
animation_behavior: Endless motion with no exit, visual logic that builds and undoes itself, infinite return spirals ---
